scenarios.name: submissions stay sealed until the organizer closes; only the organizer adds tasks and awards

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_scavenger_hunt__hunts (id, title, status, visibility, created_by, created_at) VALUES (?, 'Test Hunt', 'open', 'everyone', ?, '2099-01-01T00:00:00Z')
INSERT INTO app_scavenger_hunt__tasks (id, hunt_id, title, points, sort_order, created_by, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, 'A red leaf', 1, 0, ?, '2099-01-01T00:01:00Z')
INSERT INTO app_scavenger_hunt__tasks (id, hunt_id, title, points, sort_order, created_by, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, 'Forged task', 1, 1, ?, '2099-01-01T00:02:00Z')
INSERT INTO app_scavenger_hunt__submissions (id, hunt_id, task_id, member_id, photo_file_id, caption, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, '', 'found it', '2099-01-01T00:03:00Z')
INSERT INTO app_scavenger_hunt__awards (id, hunt_id, submission_id, points_awarded, awarded_by, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, 99, ?, '2099-01-01T00:04:00Z')
UPDATE app_scavenger_hunt__hunts SET status='closed' WHERE id = ?
INSERT INTO app_scavenger_hunt__awards (id, hunt_id, submission_id, points_awarded, awarded_by, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, 1, ?, '2099-01-01T00:05:00Z')
